original_hypothesis.title: Unbounded Fee Configuration Causes Underflow DoS
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The `ILOManager` owner can set `PLATFORM_FEE` and `PERFORMANCE_FEE` to values greater than 10000 (100%). If this occurs, the `_deductFees` function in `ILOPool` will attempt to subtract an amount larger than the input amount, causing an integer underflow (in Solidity 0.7.6) and reverting all user claims.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Missing bounds checks on fee setters can lead to accidental or malicious denial of service for core protocol functions.

proof_of_signal.pattern: Unbounded fee setters allow values > 10000, causing underflow in _deductFees

preconditions: A new project is initialized capturing this fee

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: Missing upper bound validation on fee parameters
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: Allows fees > 100%, causing underflow during deduction

validation_requirements: Initialize a project and launch it
Attempt to claim and verify the underflow revert

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: The `ILOManager` owner accidentally sets the `PLATFORM_FEE` to 20000 instead of 2000. A new project is initialized, caching this fee. After launch, investors attempt to claim their liquidity. `_deductFees` calculates the fee as 200% of the amount, and the subtraction `amount0 - fee` underflows, reverting the transaction. All claims for this project are permanently bricked.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Permanent lock of all vested liquidity for projects initialized with the bad fee
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All investors in the affected projects
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: None, as fees are cached per project at initialization

technical_investigation_focus.detection_analysis: Visible on-chain via the setter transaction

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
